 #
 msgid ""
 msgstr ""
-"Project-Id-Version: vllm-ascend \n"
+"Project-Id-Version: vllm-ascend\n"
 "Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
 "POT-Creation-Date: 2026-06-22 05:29+0000\n"
 "PO-Revision-Date: YEAR-MO-DA HO:MI+ZONE\n"
 "Last-Translator: FULL NAME <EMAIL@ADDRESS>\n"
-"Language: zh_CN\n"
 "Language-Team: zh_CN <LL@li.org>\n"
-"Plural-Forms: nplurals=1; plural=0;\n"
+"Language: zh_CN\n"
 "MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
 "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8\n"
 "Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"
+"Plural-Forms: nplurals=1; plural=0;\n"
 "Generated-By: Babel 2.18.0\n"
 
-msgid "Layerwise KV Pool"
-msgstr "逐层KV池"
-
-msgid ""
-"Layerwise mode is an optimization for the AscendStore KV Pool that saves "
-"and loads KV cache **layer by layer** instead of as a single bulk copy. "
-"By pipelining the transfer of one layer with the attention computation of"
-" the next, it reduces the stall that occurs when the entire KV cache must"
-" arrive before any forward progress can be made."
-msgstr ""
-"逐层模式是AscendStore KV池的一种优化方式，它将KV缓存**逐层**保存和加载，而非作为单个批量拷贝。"
-"通过将一层的传输与下一层的注意力计算流水线化，减少了因整个KV缓存必须全部到达后才能进行任何前向计算而导致的停顿。"
-
-msgid ""
-"Layerwise mode works in **both PD-Mixed** (`kv_role: \"kv_both\"`) and "
-"**PD disaggregation** (`kv_role: \"kv_producer\"` / `\"kv_consumer\"`) "
-"scenarios. See the [KV Pool guide](kv_pool.md) for the general KV Pool "
-"architecture and backend setup."
-msgstr ""
-"逐层模式在**PD混合**（`kv_role: \"kv_both\"`）和**PD分离**（`kv_role: \"kv_producer\"` / `\"kv_consumer\"`）场景下均适用。"
-"有关通用KV池架构和后端设置，请参阅[KV池指南](kv_pool.md)。"
-
-msgid "How It Works (Brief)"
-msgstr "工作原理（简述）"
-
-msgid ""
-"Without layerwise mode, the KV cache for a request is saved to (or loaded"
-" from) the pool as one bulk operation after the full forward pass "
-"completes (or before it starts). For long prompts this bulk transfer "
-"introduces a serialization stall."
-msgstr ""
-"不使用逐层模式时，请求的KV缓存会在完整前向传播完成后（或开始前）作为一次批量操作保存到（或加载自）池中。"
-"对于长提示词，这种批量传输会引入序列化停顿。"
-
 msgid "Layerwise mode splits the save/load at the layer granularity:"
 msgstr "逐层模式以层为粒度拆分保存/加载操作："
 
-msgid ""
-"**Saving** (producer / kv_both): after computing layer *i*'s attention, "
-"the KV for that layer is immediately sent to the pool backend. The next "
-"layer's computation proceeds in parallel with the transfer."
-msgstr ""
-"**保存**（producer / kv_both）：计算完第*i*层的注意力后，该层的KV立即发送到池后端。"
-"下一层的计算与传输并行进行。"
-
-msgid ""
-"**Loading** (consumer / kv_both): before computing layer *i*'s attention,"
-" the system waits for layer *i*'s KV to arrive from the pool "
-"(`wait_for_layer_load`), then proceeds. The transfer of layer *i+1* "
-"overlaps with the attention computation of layer *i*."
-msgstr ""
-"**加载**（consumer / kv_both）：计算第*i*层注意力之前，系统等待第*i*层的KV从池中到达"
-"（`wait_for_layer_load`），然后继续执行。第*i+1*层的传输与第*i*层的注意力计算重叠。"
-
-msgid ""
-"The net effect: save/load latency is amortized across the forward pass "
-"rather than concentrated as a single blocking step."
-msgstr ""
-"最终效果：保存/加载延迟在前向传播过程中被分摊，而非集中为单个阻塞步骤。"
-
-msgid "Prerequisites"
-msgstr "前提条件"
-
-msgid ""
-"Layerwise mode currently requires the **memcache** backend (`backend: "
-"\"memcache\"`). Install and configure memcache_hybrid before proceeding —"
-" see the [KV Pool guide](kv_pool.md) for memcache installation, config "
-"files (`mmc-meta.conf` / `mmc-local.conf`), and MetaService startup."
-msgstr ""
-"逐层模式当前需要**memcache**后端（`backend: \"memcache\"`）。"
-"请先安装并配置memcache_hybrid——有关memcache安装、配置文件（`mmc-meta.conf` / `mmc-local.conf`）和MetaService启动，请参阅[KV池指南](kv_pool.md)。"
-
 msgid "Additional setup:"
 msgstr "额外设置："
 
-msgid "Configuration"
-msgstr "配置"
-
 msgid "Add `use_layerwise: true` to the `AscendStoreConnector` extra config:"
 msgstr "在`AscendStoreConnector`的额外配置中添加`use_layerwise: true`："
 
 msgid ""
 "Change `\"kv_role\"` to `\"kv_producer\"` or `\"kv_consumer\"` for PD "
 "disaggregation."
-"
 msgstr "对于PD分离，将`\"kv_role\"`改为`\"kv_producer\"`或`\"kv_consumer\"`。"
 
-msgid "Key Parameters"
-msgstr "关键参数"
-
-msgid "Parameter"
-msgstr "参数"
-
-msgid "Default"
-msgstr "默认值"
-
-msgid "Description"
-msgstr "描述"
-
-msgid "`use_layerwise`"
-msgstr "`use_layerwise`"
-
-msgid "`false`"
-msgstr "`false`"
-
-msgid "Enable layer-by-layer KV save/load. Requires `backend: \"memcache\"`."
-msgstr "启用逐层KV保存/加载。需要`backend: \"memcache\"`。"
-
-msgid "`backend`"
-msgstr "`backend`"
+msgid "Send requests directly to port 8100 — no proxy required."
+msgstr "直接向端口8100发送请求——无需代理。"
 
-msgid "`\"mooncake\"`"
-msgstr "`\"mooncake\"`"
+msgid "**Prefiller:**"
+msgstr "**预填充器：**"
 
-msgid "Storage backend. Layerwise currently supports `\"memcache\"` only."
-msgstr "存储后端。逐层模式当前仅支持`\"memcache\"`。"
+msgid "**Decoder:**"
+msgstr "**解码器：**"
 
-msgid "`mooncake_rpc_port`"
-msgstr "`mooncake_rpc_port`"
+msgid "Send requests to the proxy:"
+msgstr "向代理发送请求："
 
-msgid "`\"0\"`"
-msgstr "`\"0\"`"
+msgid "# Layerwise KV Pool"
+msgstr "# 逐层KV池"
 
 msgid ""
-"RPC port for the scheduler↔worker lookup service. Use `\"0\"` to auto-"
-"assign, or a unique port per instance."
-"
-msgstr "调度器↔工作节点查找服务的RPC端口。使用`\"0\"`自动分配，或为每个实例指定唯一端口。"
+"Layerwise mode is an optimization for the AscendStore KV Pool that saves and\n"
+"loads KV cache **layer by layer** instead of as a single bulk copy. By pipelining\n"
+"the transfer of one layer with the attention computation of the next, it reduces\n"
+"the stall that occurs when the entire KV cache must arrive before any forward\n"
+"progress can be made."
+msgstr ""
+"逐层模式是AscendStore "
+"KV池的一项优化，它**逐层**保存和加载KV缓存，而不是作为单个批量复制。通过将一层的传输与下一层的注意力计算流水线化，它减少了在能够进行任何前向推进之前必须等待整个KV缓存到达时发生的停顿。"
 
-msgid "`layerwise_prefetch_layers`"
-msgstr "`layerwise_prefetch_layers`"
+msgid ""
+"Layerwise mode works in **both PD-Mixed** (`kv_role: \"kv_both\"`) and **PD\n"
+"disaggregation** (`kv_role: \"kv_producer\"` / `\"kv_consumer\"`) scenarios. See the\n"
+"[KV Pool guide](kv_pool.md) for the general KV Pool architecture and backend\n"
+"setup."
+msgstr ""
+"逐层模式在**PD混合**（`kv_role: \"kv_both\"`）和**PD分离**（`kv_role: \"kv_producer\"` / "
+"`\"kv_consumer\"`）场景中均有效。有关通用KV池架构和后端设置，请参阅[KV池指南](kv_pool.md)。"
 
-msgid "`1`"
-msgstr "`1`"
+msgid "## How It Works (Brief)"
+msgstr "## 工作原理（简述）"
 
 msgid ""
-"Number of layers to prefetch ahead of the compute frontier. Higher values"
-" improve overlap at the cost of memory."
-"
-msgstr "在计算前沿之前预取的层数。更高的值可改善重叠，但会消耗更多内存。"
+"Without layerwise mode, the KV cache for a request is saved to (or loaded from)\n"
+"the pool as one bulk operation after the full forward pass completes (or before\n"
+"it starts). For long prompts this bulk transfer introduces a serialization\n"
+"stall."
+msgstr ""
+"在没有逐层模式的情况下，请求的KV缓存会在完整前向传播完成后（或开始前）作为一次批量操作保存到（或加载自）池中。对于长提示词，这种批量传输会引入序列化停顿。"
 
-msgid "`layerwise_max_transfer_blocks`"
-msgstr "`layerwise_max_transfer_blocks`"
+msgid ""
+"1. **Saving** (producer / kv_both): after computing layer *i*'s attention, the\n"
+"   KV for that layer is immediately sent to the pool backend. The next layer's\n"
+"   computation proceeds in parallel with the transfer.\n"
+"2. **Loading** (consumer / kv_both): before computing layer *i*'s attention, the\n"
+"   system waits for layer *i*'s KV to arrive from the pool\n"
+"   (`wait_for_layer_load`), then proceeds. The transfer of layer *i+1* overlaps\n"
+"   with the attention computation of layer *i*."
+msgstr ""
+"1. **保存**（生产者 / kv_both）：计算完第*i*层的注意力后，该层的KV会立即发送到池后端。下一层的计算与传输并行进行。\n"
+"2. **加载**（消费者 / kv_both）：在计算第*i*层的注意力之前，系统等待第*i*层的KV从池中到达（`wait_for_layer_load`），然后继续。第*i+1*层的传输与第*i*层的注意力计算重叠。"
 
-msgid "`0` (unlimited)"
-msgstr "`0`（无限制）"
+msgid ""
+"The net effect: save/load latency is amortized across the forward pass rather\n"
+"than concentrated as a single blocking step."
+msgstr "净效果：保存/加载延迟被分摊到整个前向传播过程中，而不是集中在一个阻塞步骤上。"
 
-msgid "Maximum number of KV blocks per transfer batch."
-msgstr "每个传输批次的KV块最大数量。"
+msgid "## Prerequisites"
+msgstr "## 前提条件"
 
-msgid "`layerwise_max_transfer_bytes`"
-msgstr "`layerwise_max_transfer_bytes`"
+msgid ""
+"Layerwise mode currently requires the **memcache** backend\n"
+"(`backend: \"memcache\"`). Install and configure memcache_hybrid before\n"
+"proceeding — see the [KV Pool guide](kv_pool.md) for memcache installation,\n"
+"config files (`mmc-meta.conf` / `mmc-local.conf`), and MetaService startup."
+msgstr ""
+"逐层模式当前需要**memcache**后端（`backend: "
+"\"memcache\"`）。在继续之前，请安装并配置memcache_hybrid——有关memcache安装、配置文件（`mmc-"
+"meta.conf` / `mmc-local.conf`）和MetaService启动，请参阅[KV池指南](kv_pool.md)。"
 
-msgid "Maximum bytes per transfer batch."
-msgstr "每个传输批次的最大字节数。"

+msgstr "## 配置"

 msgid ""

 msgid ""

+"Layerwise mode integrates with the **MLA** (`mla_v1`) and **SFA** (`sfa_v1`)\n"
+"attention backends. DeepSeek-V2/V3 and other MLA-based models are supported."

-"**后端**：逐层模式仅支持`memcache`（`mooncake`和`yuanrong`不支持`use_layerwise`）。"
+"逐层模式与**MLA**（`mla_v1`）和**SFA**（`sfa_v1`）注意力后端集成。支持DeepSeek-V2/V3和其他基于MLA的模型。"
 
 msgid ""
-"**Hybrid KV cache**: Not supported — layerwise raises "
-"`NotImplementedError` when the model has multiple KV cache group families"

+"Basic full attention (`attention_v1`) and all context-parallel (CP) variants\n"
+"(`mla_cp`, `sfa_cp`, `attention_cp`) do **not** yet integrate the layerwise\n"
+"wait/save calls. Layerwise + CP is future work."
 msgstr ""
-"**混合KV缓存**：不支持——当模型有多个KV缓存组族（混合MLA+滑动窗口注意力）时，"
-"逐层模式会抛出`NotImplementedError`。"
+"基本的全注意力（`attention_v1`）和所有上下文并行（CP）变体（`mla_cp`、`sfa_cp`、`attention_cp`）**尚未**集成逐层等待/保存调用。逐层+CP是未来的工作。"

-"**Context parallel**: Layerwise is not yet integrated with CP attention "
-"backends."
-"
-msgstr "**上下文并行**：逐层模式尚未与CP注意力后端集成。"

+msgstr "## 限制"
 
 msgid ""
-"**PD disaggregation proxy**: When using `kv_producer` / `kv_consumer`, "
-"the dedicated layerwise proxy "
-"(`load_balance_proxy_layerwise_server_example.py`) is required — the "
-"standard disagg proxy does not serve the `/v1/metaserver` endpoint."
+"* **Backend**: Only `memcache` is supported for layerwise mode (`mooncake` and\n"
+"  `yuanrong` do not support `use_layerwise`).\n"
+"* **Hybrid KV cache**: Not supported — layerwise raises\n"
+"  `NotImplementedError` when the model has multiple KV cache group families\n"
+"  (hybrid MLA + sliding-window attention).\n"
+"* **Context parallel**: Layerwise is not yet integrated with CP attention\n"
+"  backends.\n"
+"* **PD disaggregation proxy**: When using `kv_producer` / `kv_consumer`, the\n"
+"  dedicated layerwise proxy\n"
+"  (`load_balance_proxy_layerwise_server_example.py`) is required — the standard\n"
+"  disagg proxy does not serve the `/v1/metaserver` endpoint."
 msgstr ""
-"**PD分离代理**：使用`kv_producer` / `kv_consumer`时，需要专用的逐层代理"
-"（`load_balance_proxy_layerwise_server_example.py`）——标准分离代理不提供`/v1/metaserver`端点。"
\ No newline at end of file
+"* **后端**：逐层模式仅支持 `memcache`（`mooncake` 和 `yuanrong` 不支持 `use_layerwise`）。\n"
+"* **混合 KV 缓存**：不支持——当模型具有多个 KV 缓存组族（混合 MLA + 滑动窗口注意力）时，逐层模式会引发 `NotImplementedError`。\n"
+"* **上下文并行**：逐层模式尚未与 CP 注意力后端集成。\n"
+"* **PD 分离代理**：使用 `kv_producer` / `kv_consumer` 时，需要专用的逐层代理（`load_balance_proxy_layerwise_server_example.py`）——标准分离代理不提供 `/v1/metaserver` 端点。"

@@ -0,0 +1,363 @@
+# SOME DESCRIPTIVE TITLE.
+# Copyright (C) 2026, vllm-ascend team
+# This file is distributed under the same license as the vllm-ascend package.
+# FIRST AUTHOR <EMAIL@ADDRESS>, 2026.
+#
+msgid ""
+msgstr ""
+"Project-Id-Version: vllm-ascend\n"
+"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
+"POT-Creation-Date: 2026-07-16 03:36+0000\n"
+"PO-Revision-Date: 2026-07-16 03:36+0000\n"
+"Last-Translator: \n"
+"Language-Team: zh_CN <LL@li.org>\n"
+"Language: zh_CN\n"
+"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
+"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8\n"
+"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"
+"Plural-Forms: nplurals=1; plural=0;\n"
+"Generated-By: detect_po_changes.py\n"
+
+msgid "# Recompute CPU Offload Guide"
+msgstr "# 重计算CPU卸载指南"
+
+msgid "## Overview"
+msgstr "## 概述"
+
+msgid ""
+"`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` preserves the KV cache of requests that are\n"
+"preempted by the Decode-side recompute scheduler. When HBM KV blocks are not\n"
+"enough, `RecomputeScheduler` may preempt a running Decode request. Without this\n"
+"connector, the request falls back to the original recompute path and may be sent\n"
+"back to the Prefill node to run prefill again. With recompute CPU offload\n"
+"enabled, the already-computed KV blocks are copied from HBM to CPU DRAM before\n"
+"the HBM blocks are reused, and copied back to HBM when the request is scheduled\n"
+"again."
+msgstr ""
+"`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` 用于保存被解码端重计算调度器抢占的请求的KV缓存。当HBM "
+"KV块不足时，`RecomputeScheduler` "
+"可能会抢占正在运行的解码请求。如果没有此连接器，请求将回退到原始重计算路径，并可能被发送回预填充节点重新执行预填充。启用重计算CPU卸载后，已计算的KV块会在HBM块被重用前从HBM复制到CPU"
+" DRAM，并在请求再次被调度时复制回HBM。"
+
+msgid ""
+"This feature is designed for online P/D disaggregation workloads where Decode\n"
+"nodes are tuned for decode throughput and cannot efficiently recompute long\n"
+"prefills after preemption. It is opt-in and focuses on correctness first."
+msgstr ""
+"此功能专为在线P/D分离部署场景设计，其中解码节点针对解码吞吐量进行了调优，无法在抢占后高效地重计算长预填充。该功能为可选启用，并优先保证正确性。"
+
+msgid ""
+"In a typical Decode deployment, `max_num_batched_tokens` is often sized around\n"
+"`max_num_seqs * (1 + num_spec_tokens)` so that the Decode node mainly schedules\n"
+"one new token, plus speculative tokens if MTP is enabled, per request. This is\n"
+"efficient for decode but too small for recomputing long prompts after\n"
+"preemption. Recompute CPU offload avoids sending such requests back through the\n"
+"full prompt recompute path when their KV state can be preserved locally."
+msgstr ""
+"在典型的解码部署中，`max_num_batched_tokens` 通常设置为 `max_num_seqs * (1 + "
+"num_spec_tokens)` "
+"左右，使得解码节点主要调度每个请求的一个新token（如果启用了MTP，则加上推测token）。这对解码来说是高效的，但对于抢占后重计算长提示词来说则太小。重计算CPU卸载避免了在KV状态可以本地保存时将此类请求发送回完整的提示词重计算路径。"
+
+msgid "## Key Concepts"
+msgstr "## 关键概念"
+
+msgid ""
+"* **Recompute preemption**: When Decode-side HBM KV cache is exhausted,\n"
+"  `RecomputeScheduler` can preempt a running request and later resume it.\n"
+"* **CPU DRAM preservation**: `RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` stores the\n"
+"  preempted request's computed KV blocks in CPU memory.\n"
+"* **H2D restore**: When the preempted request is scheduled again, the connector\n"
+"  restores the preserved KV blocks before model forward.\n"
+"* **Fallback behavior**: If the connector is not configured, the recompute\n"
+"  scheduler is not enabled, or CPU offload capacity is insufficient, vLLM\n"
+"  falls back to the original recompute behavior.\n"
+"* **`MultiConnector` integration**: In P/D disaggregation, use\n"
+"  `MultiConnector` to combine the P/D connector, such as `MooncakeConnectorV1`,\n"
+"  with `RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` on Decode nodes."
+msgstr ""
+"* **重计算抢占**：当解码端HBM KV缓存耗尽时，`RecomputeScheduler` 可以抢占正在运行的请求，并在之后恢复它。\n"
+"* **CPU DRAM保存**：`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` 将被抢占请求的已计算KV块存储在CPU内存中。\n"
+"* **H2D恢复**：当被抢占的请求再次被调度时，连接器在模型前向传播前恢复已保存的KV块。\n"
+"* **回退行为**：如果未配置连接器、未启用重计算调度器或CPU卸载容量不足，vLLM 将回退到原始重计算行为。\n"
+"* **`MultiConnector`集成**：在P/D分离部署中，使用 `MultiConnector` 将P/D连接器（如 `MooncakeConnectorV1`）与解码节点上的 `RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` 结合使用。"
+
+msgid "## Configuration Parameters"
+msgstr "## 配置参数"
+
+msgid ""
+"`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` is configured through `kv-transfer-config`."
+msgstr "`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` 通过 `kv-transfer-config` 进行配置。"
+
+msgid "| Parameter | Description |"
+msgstr "| 参数 | 描述 |"
+
+msgid "| `kv_connector` | Must be set to `RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector`. |"
+msgstr "| `kv_connector` | 必须设置为 `RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector`。 |"
+
+msgid "| `kv_role` | Set to `kv_consumer` on Decode nodes. |"
+msgstr "| `kv_role` | 在解码节点上设置为 `kv_consumer`。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` | Optional and recommended. CPU memory budget "
+"in bytes used by each rank/card for recompute offload. If set, it overrides "
+"`cpu_bytes_to_use / world_size`. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` | 可选且推荐。每个rank/卡用于重计算卸载的CPU内存预算（字节）。如果设置，它将覆盖 "
+"`cpu_bytes_to_use / world_size`。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `cpu_bytes_to_use` | Optional. Total CPU memory budget in bytes for this "
+"vLLM instance. The connector divides it by `world_size` to get the per-rank "
+"budget. This is less direct than `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` and is easier "
+"to misconfigure in DP deployments. The default is 8 GiB total. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `cpu_bytes_to_use` | 可选。此vLLM实例的总CPU内存预算（字节）。连接器将其除以 `world_size` "
+"以获得每个rank的预算。这不如 `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` 直接，并且在DP部署中更容易配置错误。默认总值为8 GiB。 "
+"|"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `enable_offload_prefix_caching` | Optional. Enables CPU block sharing for "
+"full hashed blocks with the same prefix-cache hash. The default is `false`; "
+"keep it disabled unless explicitly testing prefix sharing. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `enable_offload_prefix_caching` | 可选。为具有相同前缀缓存哈希的完整哈希块启用CPU块共享。默认值为 "
+"`false`；除非明确测试前缀共享，否则保持禁用状态。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"Prefer `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` when you want every rank/card to use the\n"
+"same offload capacity. For example, set `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` to\n"
+"`17179869184` for 16 GiB per rank/card."
+msgstr ""
+"当您希望每个rank/卡使用相同的卸载容量时，请优先使用 `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank`。例如，将 "
+"`cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` 设置为 `17179869184` 以分配每个rank/卡16 GiB。"
+
+msgid ""
+"If you use `cpu_bytes_to_use`, remember that it is divided by `world_size`. In\n"
+"typical P/D Decode deployments, this means the value is divided by the active\n"
+"Decode DP size. For example, when starting a DP2TP8 Decode service, setting\n"
+"`cpu_bytes_to_use` to 16 GiB gives each DP rank's cards about 8 GiB of recompute\n"
+"offload space. To avoid ambiguity, use `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` for new\n"
+"deployments."
+msgstr ""
+"如果使用 `cpu_bytes_to_use`，请记住它会被 `world_size` "
+"除。在典型的P/D解码部署中，这意味着该值会被活跃的解码DP大小除。例如，启动DP2TP8解码服务时，将 `cpu_bytes_to_use` "
+"设置为16 GiB会给每个DP rank的卡大约8 GiB的重计算卸载空间。为避免歧义，新部署请使用 "
+"`cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank`。"
+
+msgid ""
+"`recompute_scheduler_enable` must also be enabled in `additional-config` on\n"
+"P/D-disaggregated Decode nodes:"
+msgstr ""
+"在P/D分离部署的解码节点上，还必须在 `additional-config` 中启用 `recompute_scheduler_enable`："
+
+msgid "## Docker Shared Memory"
+msgstr "## Docker共享内存"
+
+msgid ""
+"Recompute CPU offload allocates pinned CPU tensors for the offloaded KV blocks.\n"
+"When running in Docker, make sure the container's shared memory is large enough.\n"
+"If `--shm-size` is too small, a large per-card offload budget, such as 16 GiB\n"
+"per card, can fail to allocate CPU tensors and may cause the service to OOM or\n"
+"hang during startup."
+msgstr ""
+"重计算CPU卸载会为卸载的KV块分配固定的CPU张量。在Docker中运行时，请确保容器的共享内存足够大。如果 `--shm-size` "
+"太小，每个卡较大的卸载预算（例如每卡16 GiB）可能无法分配CPU张量，并可能导致服务在启动时OOM或挂起。"
+
+msgid ""
+"For typical A3 deployments with a large recompute-offload budget, set\n"
+"`--shm-size=1024g` when starting the container. The following snippet follows\n"
+"the Docker style used by the DeepSeek-V4-Flash tutorial:"
+msgstr ""
+"对于具有较大重计算卸载预算的典型A3部署，请在启动容器时设置 `--shm-"
+"size=1024g`。以下代码片段遵循DeepSeek-V4-Flash教程中使用的Docker风格："
+
+msgid "## Usage with P/D Disaggregation"
+msgstr "## 与P/D分离部署一起使用"
+
+msgid ""
+"On Decode nodes, configure `MultiConnector` with both the P/D connector and\n"
+"`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector`. The P/D connector handles KV transfer from\n"
+"Prefill to Decode, while `RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` handles Decode-side\n"
+"preemption preservation and restore."
+msgstr ""
+"在解码节点上，配置 `MultiConnector`，同时包含P/D连接器和 "
+"`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector`。P/D连接器处理从预填充到解码的KV传输，而 "
+"`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` 处理解码端的抢占保存和恢复。"
+
+msgid "The following example uses `MooncakeConnectorV1` for P/D KV transfer."
+msgstr "以下示例使用 `MooncakeConnectorV1` 进行P/D KV传输。"
+
+msgid ""
+"For the Prefill node, keep the normal P/D connector configuration, for example\n"
+"`MooncakeConnectorV1` with `kv_role` set to `kv_producer`."
+msgstr ""
+"对于预填充节点，保持正常的P/D连接器配置，例如将 `kv_role` 设置为 `kv_producer` 的 "
+"`MooncakeConnectorV1`。"
+
+msgid ""
+"When `kv_load_failure_policy` is also needed for the P/D connector, configure\n"
+"it on the top-level `MultiConnector` `kv-transfer-config`, not inside child\n"
+"connectors."
+msgstr ""
+"当P/D连接器也需要 `kv_load_failure_policy` 时，请在顶层 `MultiConnector` 的 `kv-transfer-"
+"config` 中配置它，而不是在子连接器内部。"
+
+msgid "## Standalone Connector Example"
+msgstr "## 独立连接器示例"
+
+msgid ""
+"`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` must be used together with the vLLM-Ascend\n"
+"`RecomputeScheduler`. Because `RecomputeScheduler` is only supported on\n"
+"P/D-disaggregated Decode nodes, recompute CPU offload is currently only\n"
+"available for P/D-disaggregated Decode nodes as well."
+msgstr ""
+"`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` 必须与 vLLM-Ascend 的 `RecomputeScheduler` "
+"一起使用。由于 `RecomputeScheduler` "
+"仅在P/D分离部署的解码节点上受支持，因此重计算CPU卸载目前也仅适用于P/D分离部署的解码节点。"
+
+msgid ""
+"The following standalone connector configuration is intended only as a minimal\n"
+"configuration fragment for validating the recompute-offload path on a\n"
+"P/D-disaggregated Decode node. It is not a PD-mixed deployment mode. In\n"
+"PD-mixed or normal non-P/D deployments, do not enable recompute CPU offload; the\n"
+"engine uses the normal vLLM recompute behavior instead."
+msgstr ""
+"以下独立的连接器配置仅作为在P/D分离的Decode节点上验证重计算-"
+"卸载路径的最小配置片段。它并非PD混合部署模式。在PD混合或普通非P/D部署中，请勿启用重计算CPU卸载；引擎将使用正常的vLLM重计算行为。"
+
+msgid "For online serving:"
+msgstr "对于在线服务："
+
+msgid "## How It Works"
+msgstr "## 工作原理"
+
+msgid ""
+"1. When `RecomputeScheduler` cannot allocate enough HBM KV blocks, it selects a\n"
+"   Decode-side running request for preemption.\n"
+"2. Before the request's HBM blocks are reused, the scheduler calls the\n"
+"   connector's preemption hook. If enough CPU blocks are available, the\n"
+"   connector records the HBM block to CPU block mapping.\n"
+"3. The model runner calls `handle_preemptions()` before updating worker state.\n"
+"   The worker copies the selected KV blocks from HBM to pinned CPU tensors.\n"
+"4. After all workers report that the store is complete, the preempted request\n"
+"   becomes restorable.\n"
+"5. When the request is scheduled again, the connector reports the number of\n"
+"   tokens that can be restored from CPU memory.\n"
+"6. The scheduler allocates new HBM blocks and the connector builds the CPU block\n"
+"   to HBM block reload mapping.\n"
+"7. Before model forward, the worker copies the restored KV blocks back to HBM.\n"
+"   Forward then continues from the restored KV state."
+msgstr ""
+"1. 当`RecomputeScheduler`无法分配足够的HBM KV块时，它会选择一个Decode端正在运行的请求进行抢占。\n"
+"2. 在请求的HBM块被重用之前，调度器调用连接器的抢占钩子。如果CPU块足够，连接器记录HBM块到CPU块的映射。\n"
+"3. 模型运行器在更新工作器状态之前调用`handle_preemptions()`。工作器将选定的KV块从HBM复制到固定的CPU张量。\n"
+"4. 在所有工作器报告存储完成后，被抢占的请求变为可恢复状态。\n"
+"5. 当请求再次被调度时，连接器报告可以从CPU内存恢复的token数量。\n"
+"6. 调度器分配新的HBM块，连接器构建CPU块到HBM块的重载映射。\n"
+"7. 在模型前向传播之前，工作器将恢复的KV块复制回HBM。前向传播从恢复的KV状态继续执行。"
+
+msgid "## Sliding-Window and MTP Support"
+msgstr "## 滑动窗口与MTP支持"
+
+msgid ""
+"Sliding-window models can contain logical block tables with null block IDs for\n"
+"tokens outside the attention window. The connector preserves logical block\n"
+"positions instead of compressing non-zero block IDs, so a block table such as\n"
+"`[0, 0, 20, 21]` remains aligned as `[0, 0, cpu_20, cpu_21]` on the CPU side.\n"
+"Only non-zero blocks are transferred."
+msgstr ""
+"滑动窗口模型可能包含注意力窗口外token的空块ID逻辑块表。连接器保留逻辑块位置而非压缩非零块ID，因此像`[0, 0, 20, "
+"21]`这样的块表在CPU端保持为`[0, 0, cpu_20, cpu_21]`的对齐形式。仅传输非零块。"
+
+msgid ""
+"With MTP or speculative decode enabled, the scheduler may allocate lookahead\n"
+"blocks. The reload path clips the H2D range to the GPU block table actually\n"
+"allocated for the resumed request."
+msgstr "启用MTP或推测解码时，调度器可能分配预读块。重载路径将H2D范围裁剪为实际分配给恢复请求的GPU块表。"
+
+msgid "## Notes and Limitations"
+msgstr "## 注意事项与限制"
+
+msgid ""
+"* This feature requires the vLLM V1 engine and the vLLM-Ascend recompute\n"
+"  scheduler.\n"
+"* The feature is only intended for Decode nodes in P/D disaggregation. It is not\n"
+"  supported in PD-mixed or normal non-P/D deployments.\n"
+"* Do not enable `recompute_scheduler_enable` in PD-mixed deployments. Without\n"
+"  P/D-disaggregated Decode-side `RecomputeScheduler`, recompute CPU offload is\n"
+"  not active and vLLM follows the normal recompute path.\n"
+"* When running in Docker with a large per-rank offload budget, reserve enough\n"
+"  shared memory. For typical A3 deployments with 16 GiB per-card offload, use\n"
+"  `--shm-size=1024g`.\n"
+"* `enable_offload_prefix_caching` is experimental and disabled by default.\n"
+"* Current D2H and H2D transfers use basic torch copy operations. They are\n"
+"  correctness-oriented and not yet optimized for transfer throughput.\n"
+"* Qwen3.5 with async scheduling is not fully supported yet. Disable async\n"
+"  scheduling when using recompute CPU offload with Qwen3.5 models.\n"
+"* If CPU memory capacity is insufficient, the connector skips offload for that\n"
+"  request and the scheduler falls back to the original recompute behavior."
+msgstr ""
+"* 此功能需要vLLM V1引擎和vLLM-Ascend重计算调度器。\n"
+"* 该功能仅适用于P/D分离中的Decode节点。PD混合或普通非P/D部署不支持。\n"
+"* 请勿在PD混合部署中启用`recompute_scheduler_enable`。没有P/D分离的Decode端`RecomputeScheduler`，重计算CPU卸载不会激活，vLLM将遵循正常的重计算路径。\n"
+"* 在Docker中运行且每个rank的卸载预算较大时，请预留足够的共享内存。对于典型的A3部署（每卡16 GiB卸载），使用`--shm-size=1024g`。\n"
+"* `enable_offload_prefix_caching`为实验性功能，默认禁用。\n"
+"* 当前的D2H和H2D传输使用基本的torch复制操作。它们以正确性为导向，尚未针对传输吞吐量进行优化。\n"
+"* Qwen3.5与异步调度尚未完全支持。使用Qwen3.5模型进行重计算CPU卸载时，请禁用异步调度。\n"
+"* 如果CPU内存容量不足，连接器会跳过该请求的卸载，调度器将回退到原始的重计算行为。"
+
+msgid "## FAQ"
+msgstr "## 常见问题"
+
+msgid "### How much CPU memory should I configure?"
+msgstr "### 我应该配置多少CPU内存？"
+
+msgid ""
+"Start with a budget that can hold the expected number of preempted request\n"
+"blocks. Prefer `cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank` because it directly controls the\n"
+"offload budget for each rank/card. For example,\n"
+"`cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank=17179869184` gives each rank/card 16 GiB."
+msgstr ""
+"从能够容纳预期被抢占请求块数量的预算开始。优先使用`cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank`，因为它直接控制每个rank/卡的卸载预算。例如，`cpu_bytes_to_use_per_rank=17179869184`为每个rank/卡提供16"
+" GiB空间。"
+
+msgid ""
+"`cpu_bytes_to_use` is divided by `world_size`. In a DP2TP8 Decode service,\n"
+"setting `cpu_bytes_to_use=17179869184` gives each DP rank's cards about 8 GiB\n"
+"of offload space. Increase the budget if logs show that CPU cache free blocks\n"
+"are insufficient."
+msgstr ""
+"`cpu_bytes_to_use`除以`world_size`。在DP2TP8的Decode服务中，设置`cpu_bytes_to_use=17179869184`为每个DP"
+" rank的卡提供约8 GiB的卸载空间。如果日志显示CPU缓存空闲块不足，请增加预算。"
+
+msgid "### How do I know the offload path is active?"
+msgstr "### 如何知道卸载路径是否激活？"
+
+msgid "Look for logs similar to:"
+msgstr "查找类似以下日志："
+
+msgid ""
+"If offload cannot be prepared, logs may show that CPU cache free blocks are\n"
+"insufficient, and the request will fall back to the original recompute path."
+msgstr "如果无法准备卸载，日志可能显示CPU缓存空闲块不足，请求将回退到原始的重计算路径。"
+
+msgid "### Is this the same as KV Cache CPU Offload?"
+msgstr "### 这与KV缓存CPU卸载相同吗？"
+
+msgid ""
+"No. `KV Cache CPU Offload` is a prefix-cache offload path for inactive KV cache\n"
+"blocks. `RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector` is specifically for preserving KV blocks\n"
+"of requests preempted by the Decode-side recompute scheduler."
+msgstr ""
+"不。`KV Cache CPU "
+"Offload`是针对非活跃KV缓存块的前缀缓存卸载路径。`RecomputeCPUOffloadConnector`专门用于保存被Decode端重计算调度器抢占的请求的KV块。"
+
+msgid "## Reference"
+msgstr "## 参考"
+
+msgid ""
+"For design background and implementation details, see\n"
+"[#10820: Recompute CPU Offload Connector](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/issues/10820)."
+msgstr ""
+"有关设计背景和实现细节，请参见\n"
+"[#10820: 重计算CPU卸载连接器](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/issues/10820)。"
